## 🎨 Artist Portfolio WordPress Plugin Release

### 📥 Installation
1. Download the `artist-portfolio-{version}.zip` file below
2. Go to WordPress Admin → Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin
3. Upload the zip file and activate
4. Install [WPGraphQL](https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-graphql/) for full functionality

### ✨ What's New
<!-- Describe new features, improvements, and bug fixes -->

### 🔧 Requirements
- WordPress 5.0+
- PHP 7.4+
- WPGraphQL plugin (recommended)
